findings.message: Mutation input mismatch: create_item accepts 'description' parameter but does not pass it to repository.create_item(), which only accepts (session, name). The description input is silently ignored, violating the principle that GraphQL inputs should be used.
findings.suggestion: Either (1) remove 'description' from the mutation signature if not needed, (2) extend repository.create_item() to accept and persist description, or (3) document in the schema if description is intentionally unused. If description is needed, update line 40 to pass it: repository.create_item(session, name, description)
